name: Nevaeh
ai_summary: Nevaeh Hudson has over 30 years of experience working with children from six weeks to 12 years old and is available full-time in Goodyear, AZ. She describes a child-centered conflict resolution approach and highlights her flexibility across all age groups as key strengths.

transcripts.q3: Hello, my name is Nevaeh Hudson. I've been working with kids for about 30. Most for years, I have experience with all ages. All the way from six weeks, all the way up to school age, and what I enjoy about working, most of the children is seeing them grow and getting a chance to make an impact in their life. No matter how small it is. Yes.
transcripts.q4: I am willing, I live in Goodyear, Getty Arizona, I'm willing to travel to, like Litchfield Park. El Mirage, surprised Glendale, and maybe like Avondale, and kind of, like, on the cusp of Avondale and Phoenix.
transcripts.q5: As far as my availability, I'm available Monday through Friday, 6:00 a.m. to 6 p.m. I would prefer an earlier shift but I'm open to all kinds of shift and I'm looking for mostly full-time work.
transcripts.q6:
I've dealt with conflict between two children by sitting them down and talking to them bowls, I would first make sure that the child that was injured or hurt, I would comfort them first and then I would move on to the second child and ask them like why they did what they did.
